title: Stock market holiday: Are BSE, NSE closed today for Good Friday 2026?
summary: Stock market holiday: This is the second market holiday this week and the first for the month of April. The stock market holiday calendar on the BSE and National Stock Exchange (NSE) shows April 3 as a trading holiday for Good Friday.

title: Faith tech firms chase growth in $35 billion market with product push
summary: As digital spirituality platforms expand into commerce, they are testing whether products can drive retention and revenue while navigating unorganized supply chains and counterfeit risks.

title: The-US Iran war opens a rare sweet spot for India’s space startups
summary: Geopolitical tensions are fueling a surge in demand for satellite surveillance data.

title: Exodus, revenue strain cloud Birlasoft CEO's Angan Guha’s turnaround plan
summary: Under Angan Guha’s watch, Birlasoft's revenue grew at a CAGR of 3.35% between FY23 and FY25, which is among the lowest for a software services provider generating $500 million to $1.5 billion in revenue.

title: In a shifting world, this is India’s leadership moment, says McKinsey global chief
summary: Resilience, talent and new technology opportunities could help India lead in a volatile and multipolar global economy, says Bob Sternfels, global managing partner at McKinsey &amp; Co.

title: West Asia war poses no recession risk for India, but economic slowdown is on the cards: Madan Sabnavis
summary: Bank of Baroda chief economist Madan Sabnavis states a recession (negative GDP growth for two quarters) is unlikely. Even in a worst-case scenario, GDP growth may slow to around 7% from 7.2-7.25% currently projected.

title: Q4 impact: Bank stocks slump up to 32% in 3 months, but brokerages bet on SBI, HDFC Bank, 6 more stocks. Check why
summary: Banking stocks have slumped up to 32% over three months, underperforming the Nifty amid FII outflows, rising oil prices and rate concerns. Brokerages remain selective, backing SBI, ICICI Bank and others despite margin pressure. Q4 results and FY27 outlook will be key triggers for the sector’s recovery.

title: Axis picks 5 smallcap stocks that can rally up to 60%. How many are in your portfolio?
summary: Axis Direct has set a Nifty target of 29,480 for December 2026, indicating 30% upside, and identified five smallcap stocks with potential gains of up to 60%. Picks include Ujjivan Small Finance Bank, Chalet Hotels and Minda Corporation, backed by improving fundamentals, strong order books and favourable sector outlook.

title: Concerns settled, share buybacks could flow via exchanges again
summary: Sebi is proposing to bring back share buybacks via stock exchanges. This reverses a decision made a year ago. New tax rules have resolved earlier concerns about fairness and tax distortions. Public shareholders will now be taxed on actual capital gains, similar to market sales. This change aims to ensure equal participation for all shareholders.

title: HDFC Bank penalises 12 execs for role in mis-selling AT1 bonds
summary: HDFC Bank has penalized at least 12 senior and mid-level executives, including Ashish Parthasarthy, for their alleged role in the mis-selling of Credit Suisse AT1 bonds. This action follows previous sackings and suspensions, with the bank attributing the issue to technical documentation and regulatory interpretation lapses rather than fraud.

title: Indices plunge 2%, then ride rupee rebound to log gains
summary: Indian benchmark indices rebounded on Thursday, closing higher after a rupee recovery spurred short covering ahead of an extended weekend. Despite early losses, Sensex and Nifty ended in positive territory, contrasting with global market weakness. Volatility remains a concern, though technical indicators suggest a potential near-term pullback.

title: Pharma calls in sick after Trump’s 100% tariff threat
summary: Pharma stocks fell Thursday after reports of US President Donald Trump mulling 100% tariffs on imported branded and patented medicine makers spooked investors in a weak market.

title: Stock market holiday today for Good Friday 2026: Are NSE, BSE and MCX open or closed on April 3? Check now
summary: NSE Holidays for Good Friday 2026: NSE, BSE Holiday Today | Domestic stock exchanges NSE and BSE are closed for trading today on account of the Good Friday holiday. Commodity exchanges MCX and NCDEX will also remain shut.

title: Global brokerages slash Nifty 50 targets! Is a deeper stock market crash coming?
summary: Global brokerages are lowering their outlook on Indian equities due to rising crude oil prices and geopolitical tensions. Citi, Nomura, Goldman Sachs, and Bernstein have cut Nifty 50 targets.

title: Rajesh Palviya of Axis Sec suggests Voltamp Transformers, Shilpa Medicare, Persistent Systems shares to buy on April 6
summary: The domestic equity markets are closed on Good Friday. On April 2, Nifty 50 rose 0.15% and Sensex 0.25% despite ongoing market challenges due to the Iran conflict and rising crude prices. India's manufacturing sector slowed, raising concerns over growth and inflation.

title: Tata Motors PV share price in focus on Monday after JLR sales rebound in Q4 as production normalises
summary: Range Rover, Range Rover Sport and Defender models’ sales came in at 77.1% of the overall sales in January-March, higher than last year’s share of 66.3%. The models are a meaningful contributor to parent Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles’ cash flow.

title: ‘April could be gold’s best month since 1980,’ says Peter Schiff —next target may be $6,000
summary: Peter Schiff believes gold's value will rise due to ongoing geopolitical tensions and macroeconomic uncertainty, prompting investors to shift from the U.S. dollar. He predicts April could be a strong month for gold, potentially reaching $5,000 to $6,000.

title: SBI Trustee releases pledged HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank shares linked to Sky Gold. Details here
summary: SBI Trustee Company has released pledged shares of HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank, previously held as security for Sky Gold and Diamonds. The release occurred on March 27, 2026, resulting in no encumbered shares in either bank.

title: Four top oil exploration stocks to watch as crude jumps 85% in 2026
summary: Brent began the year at approximately $61.98 per barrel and surged to around $114.57 by the end of trading on 27 March, following the outbreak of the Iran war on 28 February.

title: Asian markets gain; Kospi jumps over 3%, Nikkei up 1%; Hong Kong, Singapore markets closed for Good Friday holiday
summary: Asian markets today: Markets in Hong Kong, Singapore and Australia are closed for the Easter weekend. The Indian stock market is also closed for the Good Friday holiday.

title: Who is Sharon Pais? Flipkart executive likely to take over as Myntra CEO after Nandita Sinha exits
summary: Myntra CEO Nandita Sinha will step down after over a decade, ahead of Flipkart's IPO. Sharon Pais is likely to replace her. All about the executive who will take over Myntra.&nbsp;

title: OpenAI expands into media with TBPN acquisition — read Fidji Simo's full message to the team
summary: The acquisition of TBPN came as somewhat of a surprise, given that OpenAI had not previously indicated any plans to enter the media business. Here's everything you need to know about the deal.
